title: 1963 Turkish local elections
summary: Local elections were held in Turkey on 17 November 1963. In the elections, both the mayors and the local parliaments (Turkish: İl Genel Meclisi) were elected. The figures presented below are the results of the local parliament elections.
text:
Local elections were held in Turkey on 17 November 1963. In the elections, both the mayors and the local parliaments (Turkish: İl Genel Meclisi) were elected. The figures presented below are the results of the local parliament elections.

Results
Provincial assemblies
Mayors
